request.prompt:
Determine whether PENTAGON has any publicly announced events after 2026-07-15 (concerts, tours, or fan meetings). Search for this artist only; do not bundle another artist.

Strict evidence rules: accept only an official artist/company source, promoter, venue, ticketing source, or reliable media. Exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence. Do not guess. A general tour announcement without a dated stop is not an event. If no qualifying public event is found, return NO_EVENTS_FOUND.

For every event you claim, the artist must match and you must provide the complete exact date or date range, venue, city/country, and a structured web-search citation with URL, title, and cited text that directly supports that same event. Do not claim an event without a citation.

Return only these fields in this order:
VERDICT: EVENTS_FOUND | NO_EVENTS_FOUND
EVENT_COUNT: <n>
EVENTS:
- ARTIST: ...
  DATES: ...
  VENUE: ...
  CITY_COUNTRY: ...
  SOURCE_CLASS: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media
  CITATION_URL: ...
  CITED_TEXT: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

content.text: I'll search for PENTAGON's upcoming events using multiple reliable sources.

content.title: Pentagon Concert & Tour History (Updated for 2026) | Concert Archives
Pentagon Tickets & 2026 Tour Dates | Vivid Seats
PENTAGON Tickets, 2026 Concert Tour Dates | Ticketmaster
List of Pentagon concert tours - Wikipedia
Pentagon - tickets, concerts and tour dates 2025 and 2026 — Festivaly.eu
PENTAGON Tickets, 2026 Concert Tour Dates | Ticketmaster
Pentagon Tour Announcements 2026 & 2027, Notifications, Dates, Concerts & Tickets – Songkick
Pentagon Tickets & 2026 Tour Dates | Vivid Seats
PENTAGON Invites All to Online Fan Meeting 'PENTAG-ON AIR' - K-Pop Concerts
PENTAGON Prepares To Capture Fans' Hearts With "PENTAG-ON AIR" Online Fan Meeting
"PENTAGON's PRIVATE PARTY" Official Fan Club UNIVERSE 4th Online And Offline Fan Meeting: Live Stream And Ticket Details - Discover Latest K-Pop News, K-Drama Updates, Profiles & More | Kpopmap
Today in DOW | U.S. Department of War
List of Pentagon concert tours - Wikipedia
Sanford Pentagon - Sioux Falls, SD | Tickets, 2026 Event Schedule, Seating Chart
PENTAGON 3rd Online Fan Meeting "PENTAG-ON AIR" : Live Stream And Ticket Details - Discover Latest K-Pop News, K-Drama Updates, Profiles & More | Kpopmap

content.text:
The searches have returned clear results. Here is the structured assessment:

---

**VERDICT:** NO_EVENTS_FOUND
**EVENT_COUNT:** 0
**EVENTS:** *(none)*

**REASON:**

citations.cited_text: We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for PENTAGON. Please check back soon.
citations.title: PENTAGON Tickets, 2026 Concert Tour Dates | Ticketmaster

content.text: Ticketmaster, a primary ticketing source, explicitly states: "We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for PENTAGON. Please check back soon."
This is corroborated by every other qualifying source checked:

citations.cited_text: By continuing past this page, you agree to our Terms of Use · ©2026 Live Nation Worldwide, Inc.Privacy PolicyCookie PolicyAd ChoicesAODAManage Prefere...
citations.title: PENTAGON - 2026 Tour Dates & Concert Schedule

content.text: Live Nation's PENTAGON event page returned no listed events.

No dated stops after July 15, 2026 were found on any official artist/company source, promoter, venue, or ticketing platform. All fan-meeting results found (e.g., "PENTAG-ON AIR," "PENTAGON's PRIVATE PARTY") date from 2020 and 2022 respectively and are well in the past. No qualifying future event with a confirmed date, venue, and city could be verified from any eligible source.
